arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the SSO permission set.

created_date.description: The date when the SSO permission set was created.

description.description: A brief description of the SSO permission set.

id.description: The unique identifier for the SSO permission set.

name.description: The name assigned to the SSO permission set.

relay_state.description: The relay state for the SSO permission set, used for redirecting users after login.

session_duration.description: The duration of the session for the SSO permission set, typically specified in ISO 8601 format.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the SSO permission set, used for categorization and management.
